hero.title: Goodbye routine. Hello AI automation.
hero.subtitle: We build intelligent AI voice agents, chatbots, and automation systems for your business.

voiceCalls.title: AI Voice Calls
voiceCalls.description: AI agents that handle inbound and outbound calls 24/7 — answering, booking, and qualifying leads

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Bots
whatsapp.description: Smart WhatsApp assistants that respond to clients instantly, around the clock

facebook.title: Facebook Responders
facebook.description: Automated Facebook Messenger bots that engage leads and handle customer support

instagram.title: Instagram Responders
instagram.description: AI that replies to DMs and comments on Instagram, converting followers into clients

booking.title: Booking Automation
booking.description: Automatic appointment scheduling and calendar management integrated with your systems

telegram.title: Telegram AI Bots
telegram.description: Powerful Telegram bots for client communication, sales, and support automation

process.label: How It Works
process.title: From your problem to automation
process.step1Description: You explain what is hurting your business. Hundreds of unanswered calls, thousands of messages piling up, repetitive tasks draining your team. We listen and understand.
process.step2Title: We Build It In 2 Weeks. Free.
process.step2Description: Based on your situation, we design and build your custom AI solution in 2 weeks. The first month is completely free. No commitment, no payment. Just results.
process.step3Description: After your free month, if the AI is working for you, we move to a simple monthly subscription. No pressure. Only if it genuinely solves your problem.

about.title: New Generation of Automation
about.text: Adios was built by a young digital team obsessed with AI. We found a way to make automation simple, fast, and actually work for real businesses without the complexity or the corporate nonsense.
